app.name: VIO 83 AI Orchestra
app.notFoundDescription: The requested section does not exist or has been renamed.

chat.placeholder: Type a message… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
chat.noMessages: No messages yet. Start a conversation!
chat.errorSolutions:
**Solutions:**
1. Verify Ollama is running: `ollama serve`
2. Verify installed models: `ollama list`
3. Download the recommended model: `ollama pull qwen2.5-coder:3b`
chat.cloudActive: Cloud mode active — provider: {{provider}}. API keys are configured in Settings.
chat.localActive: Local AI, fully offline. Your data never leaves the Mac.

settingsPanel.cloudDescription: Enter the API keys for cloud providers. In this build they are stored in the app's local storage; Keychain integration requires the native Tauri layer.
settingsPanel.localModelsHint: Models suitable for 8GB RAM. Download with: {{command}}
settingsPanel.ramNoteDescription: With 8GB RAM, use one model at a time. 3B models are the best performers. For 7B+ models, close other applications before use.
settingsPanel.routingDescription: The orchestra automatically selects the best model for each type of request.
settingsPanel.crosscheckDescription: When enabled, a second AI verifies the first answer. Useful for critical responses but increases latency and costs.
settingsPanel.ragDescription: The RAG system compares AI responses with a database of certified sources (academic, library, official). Quality badges: 🥇 Gold, 🥈 Silver, 🥉 Bronze.
settingsPanel.strictEvidenceDescription: If enabled, the orchestrator prioritizes certified evidence through RAG. When sources are unavailable, it automatically switches to a controlled degraded mode: it does not invent data, reports limitations, but continues producing output (no hard blocks).
settingsPanel.syncError: Backend sync failed: local state remains active.
settingsPanel.author: Author

models.title: AI Models
models.noOllama: Ollama not available. Install Ollama to use local models.

errors.backend: Backend unreachable. Make sure the server is running.

privacyPage.title: Privacy & Legal
privacyPage.versionLine: VIO 83 AI Orchestra v0.9.0-beta — Viorica Porcu — AGPL-3.0 / Commercial License
privacyPage.localFirstDesc: All data is stored exclusively on your Mac, in local SQLite databases. No data is sent to project servers. No telemetry, no tracking, no advertising.
privacyPage.gdprAccessHow: Open the .db files in data/ with DB Browser for SQLite
privacyPage.gdprDeletionHow: Delete the files in data/ or use "Delete all" in Settings
privacyPage.gdprPortabilityHow: Export conversations from the Analytics section
privacyPage.cloudProvidersDesc: When you configure an API key and send a message, the text is transmitted directly to the provider via HTTPS. Their policies apply:
privacyPage.localModeNote: Local Ollama mode transmits nothing outside the device.
securityItems: Databases accessible only by the logged-in macOS user (permissions rw-------)
API keys stored in the local .env — never share this file
Backend API accessible only from localhost:4000
Cloud communications via HTTPS with TLS 1.2+
Rate limiting: 30 requests/minute per chat endpoint
privacyPage.deleteDesc: To completely delete all local data:
privacyPage.footerLicense: VIO 83 AI Orchestra is distributed under a dual license: AGPL-3.0 (open source) and proprietary commercial license.
privacyPage.footerDisclaimer: AI responses do not constitute medical, legal, or financial advice.
privacyPage.footerJurisdiction: © 2026 Viorica Porcu — Jurisdiction: Court of Cagliari, Italy

ragPage.title: RAG Knowledge Base
ragPage.subtitle: Retrieval-Augmented Generation with certified sources — ChromaDB + SQLite FTS5
ragPage.progressTarget: Target: 100K verified documents across 42 knowledge categories (1,082 sub-disciplines)

analyticsPage.title: Analytics & Intelligence
analyticsPage.subtitle: Deep performance of all AI models

runtimePage.subtitle: Local/proxy operational runtime with optimization autopilot for Ollama, OpenClaw, LegalRoom and n8n.
runtimePage.agentNote: Continuous verifiable monitoring and tuning cycle — see Health Panel below for latency and error history.
